name: Whitefish with Leek Risotto
recipeIngredient: 4 cups bottled clam juice or low-sodium chicken broth
4 7 oz pieces whitefish fillet or bass fillets
6 large leeks, sliced into thin rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Place rice, 3 cups clam juice, anchovies, rosemary and sage in a 9-by-12 baking dish. Cover and place in the oven for 30 minutes.
3. Remove from oven, place leeks on the rice and arrange whitefish on top, skin side up. Sprinkle with black pepper. Cover and replace in the oven for 15 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, combine remaining clam juice, lemon juice and mustard in a small saucepan. Place over medium heat on the stove. Bring to a boil and cook until reduced by half. Remove from heat and pour into a blender.
5. Put blender on medium speed and slowly drizzle in the oil. To serve, arrange whitefish on a platter surrounding a mound of risotto. Spoon a little sauce over the fish and serve the remainder on the side.
